Don't judge a book by [color]
Don't judge a [title] by cover

Maria spends $20 on brushes and $60 on canvas ($20 * 3), totaling $80 for these items. She also needs 5 liters of paint at $8 per liter, which costs $40 ($8 * 5). Her total expenses are $80 + $40 = $120. If she sells the painting for $200, her earnings (profit) are $200 - $120 = $80. The answer is $80.
